name: mathml-polyfills
description: [This repository](https://github.com/w3c/mathml-polyfills/) contains polyfills for features from the [MathML specification](https://w3c.github.io/mathml/), relying only on [MathML Core](https://w3c.github.io/mathml-core/) and other web technologies natively implemented in browsers. See discussion on [wiki](https://github.com/w3c/mathml-polyfills/wiki/MathML-Polyfill-Task-Force-Guidelines)
